title: CRM Lead Qualification System
summary: A smart sales process that checks, sends, and sums up each strong lead in minutes.
challenge: Strong leads sat across many systems while sales staff checked each one by hand.
strategy: Build one review process that adds data, scores fit and intent, and sends key choices to staff.
execution: We linked forms, CRM data, AI research, scores, Slack alerts, and tailored reply drafts.
